category_sources: source_facts.description says it converts pixel information into colored ASCII art.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official project wiki; source_facts.repo provides the official GitHub repository README fallback.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/cacalabs/libcaca, so repo enrichment was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies ASCII art conversion; source_facts.executables lists CLI tools including img2txt and cacaview.
